actionable_ideas: Optimize the app's login process to reduce errors and eliminate unnecessary steps like selfie verification when OTP is already provided
Improve the app's performance and speed, particularly with regards to loading charts and other features
Enhance customer support by providing more effective solutions and reducing the need for repetitive requests like screen-recorded videos
